name: Feature request

## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you trying to address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Why It Belongs In Tinkerloop

Explain why this should live in core instead of a target-owned adapter or scenario library.

## Risks

Call out any contract, complexity, or security tradeoffs.
